routes.name: home
routes.title: Home
routes.description: Landing page with voice demo, documentation shortcut, and implementation shortcut.
notes: Contains the main voice activation button.
Includes quick links to Documentation and Request Implementation.

routes.name: documentation
routes.title: Documentation
routes.description: Documentation index. Redirects to /documentation/home.
notes: Acts as a hub and redirects to the home documentation page.

routes.name: documentation-home
routes.title: Documentation Home
routes.description: NAVAI project overview, core libraries, framework coverage, and platform/device support.

routes.name: documentation-installation
routes.title: Documentation Installation
routes.description: Installation submenu group (API, Web, Mobile). Opens the API installation page as entry point.
notes: Sidebar submenu group: API, Web, Mobile.

routes.name: documentation-installation-api
routes.title: Installation API
routes.description: Backend installation guide for NAVAI HTTP contract and Express integration.

routes.name: documentation-installation-web
routes.title: Installation Web
routes.description: Frontend web installation guide for @navai/voice-frontend, routes, and local functions.

routes.name: documentation-installation-mobile
routes.title: Installation Mobile
routes.description: Mobile installation guide for @navai/voice-mobile, runtime config, and loader generation.

routes.name: documentation-demo
routes.title: Documentation Demo
routes.description: Demo submenu group (Playground API, Web, Mobile). Opens Playground API as entry point.
notes: Sidebar submenu group: Playground API, Playground Web, Playground Mobile.

routes.name: documentation-playground-api
routes.title: Playground API
routes.description: Reference backend demo README with client_secret and backend tools execution flow.

routes.name: documentation-playground-web
routes.title: Playground Web
routes.description: Reference React frontend demo README for voice navigation and realtime flow.

routes.name: documentation-playground-mobile
routes.title: Playground Mobile
routes.description: Reference React Native/Expo demo README for mobile voice integration.

routes.name: documentation-examples
routes.title: Documentation Examples
routes.description: Examples submenu group (currently Tiendas/Stores ecommerce demo). Opens the Stores demo page as entry point.
notes: Sidebar submenu group: Tiendas / Stores ecommerce demo and its in-page sections.

routes.name: documentation-playground-stores
routes.title: Demo Tiendas
routes.description: Interactive ecommerce demo with read-only SQLite seed data, localStorage product CRUD, purchase simulation, and NAVAI-friendly reports.
notes: Contains a read-only SQLite seed dataset for realistic ecommerce analytics and reports.
User-created products and purchase simulations are stored in localStorage only.
Includes anchors for reports, catalog, CRUD form, purchase form, and seed orders.

routes.name: documentation-playground-stores-overview
routes.title: Tiendas / Overview
routes.description: Overview section explaining the SQLite seed and localStorage safety model for the ecommerce demo.

routes.name: documentation-playground-stores-reports
routes.title: Tiendas / Reports and KPIs
routes.description: SQLite-backed KPI dashboard and category sales report for the demo ecommerce dataset.

routes.name: documentation-playground-stores-catalog
routes.title: Tiendas / Catalog Browser
routes.description: Combined catalog table showing read-only seed products and user-created local products.

routes.name: documentation-playground-stores-product-crud
routes.title: Tiendas / Product CRUD
routes.description: Form section to create, edit, and delete user products stored in localStorage.

routes.name: documentation-playground-stores-purchase-form
routes.title: Tiendas / Purchase Simulator
routes.description: Form section to simulate purchases on seed or user products, saved locally in the browser.

routes.name: documentation-playground-stores-seed-orders
routes.title: Tiendas / Seed Orders
routes.description: Read-only recent orders table from the SQLite seed database.

routes.name: documentation-libraries
routes.title: Documentation Libraries
routes.description: Libraries submenu group (@navai/voice-backend, @navai/voice-frontend, @navai/voice-mobile).
notes: Sidebar submenu group: backend, frontend, and mobile packages.

routes.name: documentation-voice-backend
routes.title: @navai/voice-backend
routes.description: Backend package docs: route contract, dynamic functions loading, and runtime behavior.

routes.name: documentation-voice-frontend
routes.title: @navai/voice-frontend
routes.description: Frontend web package docs: agent builder, routes, functions, and runtime config.

routes.name: documentation-voice-mobile
routes.title: @navai/voice-mobile
routes.description: Mobile package docs: WebRTC transport, session orchestration, and hooks.

routes.name: request-implementation
routes.title: Request Implementation
routes.description: Commercial implementation page with service scope, plans, and contact form.
notes: Contains implementation scope sections, pricing plans, and contact form.
Has anchor submenus for service scope, process, pricing, plans, and contact.

routes.name: request-implementation-what-you-get
routes.title: Implementation / What is included
routes.description: Submenu section with included scope and deliverables.

routes.name: request-implementation-process
routes.title: Implementation / Delivery process
routes.description: Submenu section describing discovery, staging implementation, and rollout process.

routes.name: request-implementation-pricing-note
routes.title: Implementation / Pricing model
routes.description: Submenu section with pricing model criteria based on routes, complexity, and tool depth.

routes.name: request-implementation-plans
routes.title: Implementation / Plans
routes.description: Submenu section with Starter, Growth, Scale, and Enterprise plans.

routes.name: request-implementation-contact
routes.title: Implementation / Contact form
routes.description: Submenu section with quote request form and WhatsApp contact action.
